content_body: The Janz clan enjoyed their stay!! Listening to the kids laugh, playing pool, Monopoly, Uno, and keeping their phones away made bonding so much easier. Using the river as a natural 'lap pool' was a blast. Blackberry picking down the road was also fun, and we laughed so hard. We found the property line which was lined with blackberries as well! We had a great time on the scenic railway with the kids and had fun waving at all the other tourists from the balcony. Fantastic cabin, EVERYTHING you need was already there - just bring your readiness for relaxation and enjoy the BEAUTIFUL cabin and peaceful scenery!
title: Just Bring Your Readiness to Relax!
